Understanding Browser Automation

Jane Doe
March 15, 2026

Browser automation has evolved significantly over the past decade. From simple scripting tools to full-featured frameworks, the landscape offers many options for developers.

pwright takes a unique approach by connecting to an already-running Chrome instance via the Chrome DevTools Protocol. This keeps the binary lightweight and avoids the complexity of managing browser installations.

Key features include a Playwright-compatible API, gRPC server for cross-language access, and a CLI for terminal workflows.
